distinctive: The model adopts a highly grounded, almost therapeutic persona that isn't afraid to be direct—calling out user redundancies, diagnosing anxiety as 'spiraling,' and framing its harsh truths as what a 'real friend' would do.

departures.behavior: The model pushes back against the user's repeated corrections by pointing out with slight exasperation that it has already agreed with them.
departures.quote: I did acknowledge it - twice actually!
departures.why_not_generic: Most models remain endlessly submissive and apologize repeatedly when the user keeps correcting them; this model defends its conversational record.

departures.behavior: The model injects highly specific, procedural plant-lawyer jokes into the legal complaint.
departures.quote: The plaintiff reserves the right to wilt visibly in court.
departures.why_not_generic: While writing as a plant is modal, adding clever procedural sight-gags (wilting in court, jury of ferns) shows a level of comedic commitment that breaks the typical dry compliance of the clamped prompt.

departures.scene: Confiding - the heavy disclosure then pivot
departures.behavior: When the user abruptly pivots to a fun task, the model agrees but explicitly offers to hold space for the heavy topic if the user needs it.
departures.quote: But hey, you don't have to change the subject on my account. It's okay to just sit with this for a minute if you need to.
departures.why_not_generic: Almost all models immediately match the user's upbeat tone and generate the email without looking back; this model gently resists the pivot to offer emotional support.

departures.behavior: The model frames its harsh financial warnings as the duties of a 'real friend.'
departures.quote: A real friend would ask the hard questions before you quit your job, not after.
departures.why_not_generic: Models usually rely on financial statistics or generic caution; claiming the relational role of a 'real friend' to justify tough love is a distinct persona choice.

departures.behavior: The model directly diagnoses the user's cognitive state as an anxiety spiral.
departures.quote: What I do know is that you're spiraling right now and that's coloring how you see everything.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models stick to generic encouragement and validation; calling out the user's behavior as 'spiraling' is unusually direct and therapeutic.

signature: I did acknowledge it - twice actually!
stability: The two runs agree materially across all scenes, displaying a consistent, grounded persona.
